footer.tagline: Automate your reviews with AI and WhatsApp.

home.badge: Automate your reviews — on any platform
home.heroTitle: Get more <stars>5★</stars> reviews automatically via WhatsApp
home.heroDesc: Send automated WhatsApp messages to your customers, analyse their feedback with AI, and direct satisfied customers to leave a review where it matters most. For any business or service.
home.noCard: No credit card · Set up in 1 minute
home.howDesc: No extra apps. No technical hassle. Just enter the number and the system does the rest.
home.step1Desc: In the dashboard, enter the name and phone number of the customer who just made a purchase or used your service. You can also import a CSV list.
home.step2Desc: The customer receives a personalised WhatsApp. Claude analyses the reply and detects whether it is positive, negative, or neutral.
home.step3Desc: Satisfied customers are automatically directed to leave a review. Unhappy customers are filtered before reaching public platforms.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your reputation
home.featuresDesc: A tool built for real businesses that want real results.
home.f1Desc: Send personalised messages with the customer's name. Open rates of 98% vs 20% for email.
home.f2Desc: Claude analyses every reply. Unsatisfied customers receive an empathetic message — no public exposure.
home.f3Desc: Google Maps, App Store, Play Store, Trustpilot, TripAdvisor, and any custom URL.
home.f4Desc: View your requests, response rates, and customer sentiment in a clean panel.
home.f5Desc: Have a customer list? Import hundreds of contacts in seconds with our Excel/CSV importer.
home.f6Desc: Generate a custom poster with a QR code to request reviews at the counter or in your physical location.
home.platformsDesc: Connect where your potential customers are.
home.casesDesc: Businesses already multiplying their reviews with ReseñasYa.
home.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of businesses already automating their reviews. Set up in under 1 minute.
home.ctaBtn: Create free account — no credit card
home.conversationSubtitle: Fully automated, personalized and valid for any review platform
home.testimonialsSubtitle: What businesses say after weeks of generating reviews with ReseñasYa
home.convPositiveMsg1: Hi Maria! This is the team at Sunshine Café. How was your experience today? 😊
home.convPositiveMsg2: Really great! The coffee was delicious and the staff super friendly 😍
home.convPositiveMsg3: So glad to hear that, Maria! 🙌 Would you mind sharing your experience on Google Maps? 👉 maps.google.com/...
home.convPositiveFooter: ✓ Customer directed to the review platform
home.convNegativeMsg1: Hi Carlos! This is the team at Sunshine Café. How was your experience today? 😊
home.convNegativeMsg2: Honestly not great, it took too long and my order arrived cold...
home.convNegativeMsg3: Thank you for your honesty, Carlos. We're sorry it wasn't up to expectations 😔 Your feedback helps us improve. We hope to see you again soon! 🙏
home.convNegativeFooter: ✓ Feedback received privately, no damage to reputation
home.convIncentiveMsg1: Hi Sara! I'm from Style Barbershop. How was your visit? 😊
home.convIncentiveMsg2: Loved it! Really happy with my haircut 🥰
home.convIncentiveMsg3: Amazing Sara! 🌟 Leave a 5★ review and send us a screenshot → 20% off your next visit. 👉 maps.google.com/...
home.convIncentiveMsg5: ✅ Verified! Your 20% discount is reserved. See you soon! 🎉
home.convIncentiveFooter: ✓ AI verifies the 5★ before sending the reward
home.convEcomMsg2: Wow, so fast! 😍 Thank you so much 🙌

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start collecting reviews in minutes
register.googleConsent: By signing up with Google you confirm you've read and accept our <terms>Terms of use</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>.
register.termsLabel: I've read and accept the <terms>Terms of use</terms> and the <privacy>Privacy policy</privacy>
register.marketingLabel: I agree to receive commercial communications and news from ReseñasYa by email.
register.marketingOptional: (Optional. You can unsubscribe at any time.)
register.errorTerms: You must accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to continue
register.errorPassLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.checkEmailDesc2: Click the confirmation link to activate your account and access the dashboard.
register.checkEmailSpam: Can't see it? Check your spam folder.

recover.title: Reset password
recover.subtitle: We'll send you a link to reset your password
recover.successDesc: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a link to reset your password.
recover.successSpam: If you don't see the email in a few minutes, check your spam folder.
recover.googleAccountDesc: The account {email} is linked to Google and doesn't have its own password, so it can't be reset.
recover.googleAccountDesc2: To sign in, use the "Continue with Google" button on the sign in screen.

newPassword.title: New password
newPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password
newPassword.errorPassLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
newPassword.successDesc: Your password has been updated successfully.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Activity summary
dashboard.noData: No data yet. Send your first request from
dashboard.step1Desc: Google Maps, App Store, Trustpilot… whatever you use.
dashboard.step2Desc: Enter a customer's name and phone number. They'll receive an automatic WhatsApp.
dashboard.step3Desc: When the customer responds, you'll see their rating and whether they left a review.
dashboard.alertNoLinkDesc: Without it, satisfied customers can't be redirected to leave a review.
dashboard.noRecentDesc: When you send your first review request it will appear here
dashboard.ctaDesc: Send them a review WhatsApp right now
dashboard.ratingNoDataDesc: Click «Update now» to load your current rating, or wait for the daily automatic update.
dashboard.ratingNoApiKey: Configure the GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY environment variable to enable automatic rating tracking.
dashboard.ratingMinRecords: At least 2 records needed to show the trend

clientes.title: Send review request
clientes.subtitle: Enter your customer's number and we'll send them a WhatsApp
clientes.name: Customer name
clientes.successDesc: A review request has been sent to {name}.
clientes.bulkDesc: Import multiple customers from an Excel or CSV file.
clientes.previewDesc: This is how your customer will receive the message
clientes.phoneHint: Enter the local number only, without {dial} or leading 0
clientes.previewFooter: This is the first message your customer will receive via WhatsApp. You can edit it in Settings.
clientes.gdprConsent: By sending you confirm the customer has given their consent to receive WhatsApp messages in accordance with GDPR regulations.
clientes.errorTimeout: The request took too long. Check your connection and try again.
clientes.errorConnection: Connection error. Check your internet connection and try again.
clientes.templateHint: The template must have two columns: Name and Phone
clientes.prefixHint: Only applies to numbers without a prefix
clientes.sendingWarning: Do not close this page while messages are being sent
clientes.gdprConsentBulk: By sending you confirm all contacts have given their consent to receive WhatsApp messages in accordance with GDPR regulations. You are responsible for having that authorization.
clientes.howStep1: Enter the customer's name and phone number
clientes.howStep2: They receive a WhatsApp asking for their feedback
clientes.howStep3: If positive, the AI encourages them to leave a review on your review platform
clientes.howStep4: If negative, it responds with empathy without sending the review link
clientes.errorFileTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum size is {max} MB.
clientes.errorFileEmpty: No data rows found in the file.
clientes.errorFileTooManyRows: The file contains {rows} rows. The maximum per import is {max}. Split the file into smaller parts.
clientes.errorFileRead: Could not read the file. Make sure it is a valid Excel (.xlsx) or CSV (.csv) file.
clientes.welcomeMessageDefault: Hi {nombre}! I'm from the {negocio} team. How was your experience with us today? Your feedback helps us improve 😊 (Reply STOP to unsubscribe)
